Mercury will cause the following effects : (1) & (8) gambler,
indebted, drunkard, atheist, thief, penniless, having a wicked
wife, a cheat and liar; (2) and (7) be a teacher, having many

90 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
children, and wives, intent on amassing wealth, generous, and
devoteJ to teachers; (3) boastful, learned in arts and sciences,
affable in speech, and intent on happiness; (4) earning wealth by
means of water and hater of relations; (5) hated by women;
devoid of wealth, happiness and children, wanderer, ignorant,
fond of women and suffering humiliation at the hands of one's
own people: (6) charitable, learned, very virtuous, happy,
